About Me

This blog is coded by hand from the ground up in Astro. No templates, no prebuilt HTML or CSS. It's just me, a static site generator, a bunch of tutorials, and the troubleshooting support of some helpful friends. This site is a learning exercise as well as a general dev blog.

My goals with this project are:

  • to create a website I actually enjoy updating through use of a static site generator
  • to practice using Git, GitHub, and Neocities through regular commits and pushes
  • to document my thinking process and development of various projects, for my own future reference and public proof of what I've learned
